description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/openki/sysadmin/docker-ci-container:latest, caching node_modules/, .npm/ and .meteor/. Define stages lint, cleanup, test and deploy. Add a lint job in the lint stage that runs ./ci/lint.sh. Add a cleanup job in the cleanup stage that runs rm -rf .meteor/ .npm/ node_modules/. Add a test job in the test stage that runs ./ci/test.sh, allows failure, has a 50m timeout and sets CYPRESS_RECORD_KEY from a secret variable. Include the Code-Quality and SAST templates; the code_quality job is disabled when $CODE_QUALITY_DISABLED is true and runs only on merge requests targeting dev, and a semgrep-sast job runs only on the dev branch. In the deploy stage add three trigger jobs: deploy_dev runs only on the dev branch, deploy_sandbox only on main, and deploy_staging only on staging; each triggers the Openki/sysadmin/deploy-config pipeline with SOURCE_BRANCH and TARGET_HOST variables matching the environment and always runs.
